target.label: invariant sync-gate runtime tooling (reader + walker + drift detector)

rationale: Runtime-tooling story whose § Testing Standards explicitly defers per-AC automated unit coverage to Story 1.16 (test-runner landing). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%, P1 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at substrate level. Task 5's three shell-invocation smoke tests exercised AC 1 + AC 4 + AC 7 end-to-end (clean-path exit 0; drift-path exit 1 + JSON DriftReport on stderr for `INV-tsconfig-base content-hash-mismatch`; performance 0.77s wall-clock <2s budget). AC 2 / AC 3 / AC 5 realised schema-level (Zod superRefine uniqueness) + structurally (sync-gate branches) with CR adversarial pass as the agreed backstop. AC 2 source-tree auto-discovery + AC 6 CI workflow wiring are explicit spec scope carve-outs deferred to later stories. All 7 substrate quality gates green (typecheck / lint / build / format:check / commitlint / prek / install). FR14n ATDD-skip precedent applied at iter-3 on analogous three-prong rationale; trace gate mirrors that decision.
